description: User hovers over the information icon for the 'Minimum cover for rental car excess' slider.
frame_description: The user is on the 'Cover levels' page, looking at the minimum cover sliders.

description: User drags the 'Minimum cover for rental car excess' slider handle to increase the amount.
frame_description: The user interacts with the rental car excess slider, moving it from $2,000 to $3,000.

description: The value for rental car excess updates on screen as the slider is moved.
frame_description: The numerical value above the slider handle changes to reflect the new selection.

description: User hovers over the information icon for the 'Pre-existing medical conditions' section.
frame_description: The cursor pauses over the info icon next to the medical conditions heading.

description: User hovers over the checkbox for pre-existing medical conditions assessment.
frame_description: The cursor lingers over the checkbox before clicking.

description: User clicks the checkbox 'Only show policies that allow assessment of pre-existing medical conditions?'.
frame_description: The user activates the checkbox to filter policies based on medical assessment.

description: A checkmark appears in the medical conditions checkbox.
frame_description: The UI updates to show the checkbox is now selected.

description: User clicks the 'Continue' button at the bottom of the Cover levels page.
frame_description: The user proceeds to the next step of the quote process.

description: The page navigates from 'Cover levels' to the 'Contact details' section.
frame_description: The screen transitions to a new page containing form fields for personal details.

description: User scrolls down the Contact details page to view the 'Your details' form.
frame_description: The page content moves vertically to bring the input fields into view.

description: User hovers over the 'See results' button before starting to fill the form.
frame_description: The cursor briefly pauses on the primary action button.

description: User clicks into the 'First name' input field.
frame_description: The user focuses the first name field to begin typing.

description: User types 'Sophia' into the First name field.
frame_description: The name 'Sophia' appears character by character in the text box.

description: User clicks into the 'Last name' input field.
frame_description: The user moves focus to the last name field.

description: User types 'Jayde' into the Last name field.
frame_description: The name 'Jayde' is entered into the form.

description: User clicks into the 'Email' input field.
frame_description: The user focuses the email address field.

description: User types their email address into the form.
frame_description: The user enters a full email address into the text field.

description: User clicks the 'See results' button to submit the form.
frame_description: The user triggers the final submission to view insurance quotes.

description: A loading screen with meerkats appears while the results are being fetched.
frame_description: The form disappears and is replaced by a full-screen loading animation featuring the brand's meerkat characters.
